title: David March (rugby league)
description: English former professional rugby league footballer
extract: David March (born 25 July 1979) is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played as a hooker in the 1990s, 2000s and 2010s. He played for the Thornhill Trojans, Wakefield Trinity, York City Knights, Hunslet and the Keighley Cougars, occasionally featuring as a stand-off, scrum-half and loose forward.
